scanAndDrawAll(LotteryDrawHelper.OnDrawCompleteListener) - Static method in class com.example.myapplication.LotteryDrawHelper
Queries Firestore for all events whose registration deadline has passed and whose draw has not yet been completed, then calls performDraw() for each.

showAnnouncementDialog(Context, String, String, String, List<String>) - Static method in class com.example.myapplication.AnnouncementHelper
Shows a popup dialog letting the Organizer type a custom message, then pushes that message as a Notification to everyone in the specified status group.
